allow: Bash(git -c user.email=dev@pixelholiday.local -c user.name=PixelHoliday commit -q -m "Phase 1 Complete: Core Revenue Engine:*)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -c "CREATE DATABASE pixeleco;")

Bash(tail -3 cat EOF DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/pixeleco?schema=public NEXTAUTH_SECRET=dev-secret-change-me NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000 NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://localhost:3000 EOF echo ---PUSH--- npx prisma db push)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "$PSQL" -U postgres -h localhost -d pixeleco -tA -c "SELECT id, ""magicLinkToken"" FROM ""Gallery"" LIMIT 2;")

Bash(export PGPASSWORD=postgres PSQL='/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe' GID=cmnow7ox70016jjfhzx3kzgzm TOKEN=cmnow7ox70017jjfhtkzpqkyg echo "All orders for gallery \(expect seeded + new from webhook\):" "$PSQL" -U postgres -h localhost -d pixeleco -tA -c "SELECT id, amount, ""paymentMethod"", ""stripeSessionId"" FROM ""Order"" WHERE ""galleryId""=''''$GID'''' ORDER BY ""createdAt"";" echo echo "Commissions for this gallery''''s orders:" "$PSQL" -U postgres -h localhost -d pixeleco -tA -c "SELECT c.type, c.amount, c.""orderId"" FROM ""Commission"" c WHERE c.""orderId"" IN \(SELECT id FROM ""Order"" WHERE ""galleryId""=''''$GID''''\);" echo echo "Photos with cloudinaryId? \(download requires real ones\)" "$PSQL" -U postgres -h localhost -d pixeleco -tA -c "SELECT id, ""cloudinaryId"" FROM ""Photo"" WHERE ""galleryId""=''''$GID'''' LIMIT 3;" echo echo "Download endpoint:" curl -sv "http://localhost:3000/api/gallery/$TOKEN/download")
Bash("$PSQL" -U postgres -h localhost -d pixeleco -tA -c "SELECT id, amount, ""paymentMethod"", ""stripeSessionId"", ""createdAt"" FROM ""Order"" WHERE ""galleryId""=''$GID'';")
Bash("$PSQL" -U postgres -h localhost -d pixeleco -tA -c "SELECT id, source, ""createdAt"" FROM ""ProcessedWebhookEvent"" ORDER BY ""createdAt"" DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash("$PSQL" -U postgres -h localhost -d pixeleco -tA -c "SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) FROM ""Gallery"" GROUP BY status;")
Bash(curl -s -b /tmp/jar_admin "http://localhost:3000/admin/blog" -o /tmp/blog.html echo "match count for both posts:" grep -oE "5 reasons|How AquaSplash" /tmp/blog.html)
